---
title: "Natalie Smith"
image: headshot.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 30em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/natsmith/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/plantsmith
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:nasmith@bren.ucsb.edu
---
## Hi, I'm Natalie:

I'm fascinated by the intersection of the natural and built environment, with a deep interest in biodiversity, connectivity, climate adaptation, and data science. I'm currently working towards my master's degree at the Bren School of Environmental Science & Management (UCSB), specializing in Conservation Planning, with an emphasis on climate and data science. 

## Education: 

MESM, Environmental Science and Management (2025), Bren School of Environmental Science & Management (UCSB)

BM, Songwriting, Berklee College of Music
